_comment: THE REVENUE LADDER — the money view's source of truth. Each product's STAGE toward its first paying dollar and WHOSE hand the next move needs. The fleet fills in the live/mechanical numbers (PRs shipped, open work) every beat; YOU curate the stage + gate here. Edit freely: this is what the money dashboard, the phone page, and the push notifications all read. Spine: real income before unemployment ends (~late Aug 2026) — enough to rent an EV and live/work/travel.
spine: real income in <10 weeks — rent an EV, live/work/travel

products.next_action: DOLLAR #1 today = Ko-fi + GitHub Sponsors donations (no LLC, no code). I prep FUNDING.yml + README links; you create the two accounts (~10 min each). Pro tier = I rebase the stacked, CI-green checkout PRs (conflicting only because none merged); you create the LemonSqueezy product + paste LEMONSQUEEZY_STORE_ID.
products.first_dollar_path: donations NOW via Ko-fi/Sponsors (individual rail); Pro tier via Lemon Squeezy (code already integrated). NOT Stripe — that needs an LLC blocked by the card-0186 hold.
products.note: live on GreasyFork with real daily users, monetized at $0 — the gap to the first dollar is account creation, not code

products.next_action: drive remaining PRs green, then to deploy-ready
products.first_dollar_path: data-as-a-service / one-off scrape gigs once deployed
subscription on the automation tier once live

your_levers: Ko-fi + GitHub Sponsors on the Exporter — donations flow TODAY (no LLC, no code; ~10 min each, I prep FUNDING.yml + README)
Create the LemonSqueezy product + paste LEMONSQUEEZY_STORE_ID — unlocks the Exporter Pro tier (code already integrated)
Stripe = DEFERRED — needs an LLC, blocked by the card-0186 Santander hold; one call clears it (also frees Anthropic + GitHub autopay) but it is NOT required for dollar #1
Pick one build-in-public channel (X / Reddit / Show HN) — I draft the launch post from the live ledger + the product
